reason: An online analyst’s world collapses when her identity is stolen, leaving her utterly isolated.
In a dystopian near-future, illicit neural recordings blur reality, driving the protagonist into seclusion.
An artificially created killer intrudes into a city detective’s life, disconnecting him from the real world.
A cyborg cop’s quest for purpose spirals as technology intended to protect turns him into a pariah.
A rescue crew enters a ship lost in deep space, only to find a virtual trap that severs them from reality.
Scientists explore an alien sphere and are drawn into a virtual coma, isolated from the living world.
A musician’s life unravels as he falls into a time loop and loses touch with family and friends.
A man’s life turns to chaos when a game blurs with reality, leaving him cut off from those he loves.
A man awakens lost in a dark city controlled by machines, his only link to home fading.
An informant’s betrayal drives him underground, estranged from the family he once fought to protect.
